name: step
label: Step
description: A single workflow step with createStep(). Has typed input/output schemas, retry, suspend/resume.

name: parallel
label: Parallel
description: Executes multiple steps concurrently and waits for all branches.

name: conditional
label: Conditional (Branch)
description: Routes execution to matching branch step based on condition functions.

name: loop_dowhile
label: Loop (Do-While)
description: Repeats a step while condition is true (do-while). Runs at least once.

name: loop_dountil
label: Loop (Do-Until)
description: Repeats a step until condition is true (do-until). Runs at least once.

name: foreach
label: For-Each
description: Iterates over a collection executing a step per element with configurable concurrency.

name: sleep
label: Sleep (Duration)
description: Pauses workflow for specified milliseconds or dynamic duration function.

name: sleep_until
label: Sleep Until (Date)
description: Pauses workflow until a specific date/time or dynamic date function.

name: workflow
label: Workflow
description: Top-level workflow container with createWorkflow(). Typed schemas, state, events, tracing.

name: workflow_processor
label: Processor Workflow
description: A processor-type workflow running as agent input/output pipeline.

name: agent
label: Agent
description: LLM-powered agent with instructions, tools, memory, voice, structured output, delegation, streaming. Usable as workflow step.

name: agent_network
label: Agent Network
description: Multi-agent network delegating tasks via routing agent. Streaming, delegation hooks, task-complete detection.

name: tool
label: Tool
description: Type-safe tool with createTool(). Input/output/suspend/resume schemas, execute, approval, MCP, provider options.

name: tool_step
label: Tool Step
description: Tool promoted to workflow step (ToolStep) with inputSchema + outputSchema.

name: tool_call_step
label: Tool Call Step (Agentic)
description: Internal agentic loop step executing a single LLM tool call via createToolCallStep().

name: processor_moderation
label: Moderation Processor
description: Detects harmful/unsafe content using LLM-based moderation model.

name: processor_pii_detector
label: PII Detector
description: Detects and optionally redacts PII (emails, phones, SSNs) from messages.

name: processor_prompt_injection
label: Prompt Injection Detector
description: Detects prompt injection and jailbreak attempts via LLM scorer.

name: processor_language_detector
label: Language Detector
description: Detects language of incoming messages and optionally translates them.

name: processor_structured_output
label: Structured Output
description: Ensures agent output conforms to a Zod/JSON schema.

name: processor_batch_parts
label: Batch Parts
description: Batches streaming text parts into larger chunks before forwarding.

name: processor_token_limiter
label: Token Limiter
description: Limits token count sent to model by truncating or summarizing history.

name: processor_system_prompt_scrubber
label: System Prompt Scrubber
description: Detects and blocks attempts to extract or leak the system prompt.

name: processor_unicode_normalizer
label: Unicode Normalizer
description: Normalizes Unicode text (NFC/NFD/NFKC/NFKD) to prevent homoglyph attacks.

name: processor_tool_call_filter
label: Tool Call Filter
description: Filters or blocks specific tool calls based on allow/deny lists.

name: processor_tool_search
label: Tool Search
description: Dynamically selects relevant tools via semantic search over tool descriptions.

name: processor_skills
label: Skills Processor
description: Injects workspace skill tools into the agent tool set based on context.

name: processor_workspace_instructions
label: Workspace Instructions
description: Prepends workspace-level instructions to the agent system prompt.

name: scorer
label: Scorer (Eval)
description: Reusable evaluation scorer for agent responses. Prompt-based (LLM-as-judge) or custom functions.

name: voice_speak
label: Voice Speak (TTS)
description: Text-to-speech provider converting text into audio stream.

name: voice_listen
label: Voice Listen (STT)
description: Speech-to-text provider converting audio into text.

name: voice_composite
label: Composite Voice
description: Combines separate TTS and STT providers into a single voice interface.

name: memory
label: Memory
description: Persistent conversation memory with optional working memory and semantic vector recall.

name: mcp_server
label: MCP Server
description: Model Context Protocol server exposing tools/resources/prompts over MCP (stdio or SSE).

name: mcp_client
label: MCP Client (Tool Provider)
description: Connects to external MCP server and imports its tools.

name: integration
label: Integration
description: Base integration class bundling tools and workflows from an external service.

name: openapi_toolset
label: OpenAPI Toolset
description: Generates Mastra tools from an OpenAPI spec. Each operation becomes a callable tool.

name: vector_store_astra
label: DataStax Astra
description: Vector store backend: DataStax Astra. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_chroma
label: Chroma
description: Vector store backend: Chroma. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_clickhouse
label: ClickHouse
description: Vector store backend: ClickHouse. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_cloudflare
label: Cloudflare Vectorize (Workers)
description: Vector store backend: Cloudflare Vectorize (Workers). Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_cloudflare_d1

description: Vector store backend: Cloudflare D1. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_convex

description: Vector store backend: Convex. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_couchbase

description: Vector store backend: Couchbase. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

description: Vector store backend: DuckDB. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_elasticsearch

description: Vector store backend: Elasticsearch. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_lance
label: LanceDB
description: Vector store backend: LanceDB. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_libsql
label: LibSQL (Turso)
description: Vector store backend: LibSQL (Turso). Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_mongodb
label: MongoDB Atlas
description: Vector store backend: MongoDB Atlas. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_mssql
label: Microsoft SQL Server
description: Vector store backend: Microsoft SQL Server. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_opensearch
label: OpenSearch
description: Vector store backend: OpenSearch. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_pg
label: PostgreSQL (pgvector)
description: Vector store backend: PostgreSQL (pgvector). Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_pinecone
label: Pinecone
description: Vector store backend: Pinecone. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_qdrant
label: Qdrant
description: Vector store backend: Qdrant. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_s3vectors
label: Amazon S3 Vectors
description: Vector store backend: Amazon S3 Vectors. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_turbopuffer
label: Turbopuffer
description: Vector store backend: Turbopuffer. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_upstash
label: Upstash Vector
description: Vector store backend: Upstash Vector. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: vector_store_vectorize
label: Cloudflare Vectorize
description: Vector store backend: Cloudflare Vectorize. Implements MastraVector for similarity search, upsert, and delete.

name: harness_ask_user
label: Ask User
description: Ask the user a question and wait for their response. Supports structured choices or open-ended questions.

name: harness_submit_plan
label: Submit Plan
description: Submit a step-by-step plan for accomplishing a task. Each step has a title, description, and tool references.

name: harness_task_write
label: Task Write
description: Write content to a file at a specified path. Creates or overwrites the file with provided content.

name: harness_task_check
label: Task Check
description: Check if a task or subtask has been completed by verifying expected outcomes and conditions.

name: a2a_client
label: A2A Client
description: Google Agent-to-Agent protocol client. Sends JSON-RPC tasks to a remote A2A agent.
